scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! May I see your passport and booking confirmation?
Do you have a seat preference? Window or aisle?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 좌석 선호가 있으신가요? 창가 아니면 통로?

choices.text: I want to sit on the wing.

scenes.npcDialog: How many bags are you checking in today?

choices.text: I want to check in myself.

scenes.npcDialog: Please place your laptop and liquids in a separate tray.
Please step aside. Do you have anything metal in your pockets?

choices.text: Oh, I forgot my belt. Let me remove it.
I might have some coins. Here they are.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you find something?

choices.text: I'm looking for my gate. It's gate 25.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to see anything in particular?
We're now boarding rows 20 to 35. May I see your boarding pass?
Can I help you find your seat?
Let me help you with your bag. Is this your carry-on?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 가방 넣는 것 도와드릴게요. 이게 기내용 가방인가요?

scenes.npcDialog: What would you like to drink? We have juice, water, coffee, and tea.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 음료는 뭘로 드릴까요? 주스, 물, 커피, 차가 있습니다.

scenes.npcDialog: For your meal, would you like beef or chicken?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 식사로 소고기와 닭고기 중 뭘로 드릴까요?

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else I can get for you?

choices.text: Could I get a blanket, please?
I want to sleep in first class.

scenes.npcDialog: Excuse me, the seatbelt sign is on. Could you wait a moment?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 죄송합니다, 안전벨트 사인이 켜져있어요. 잠시 기다려주시겠어요?

choices.text: Okay, I'll go back to my seat.
I don't care about the sign.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need help filling out the arrival card?

choices.text: Yes, what should I write for 'purpose of visit'?
Where do I write my hotel address?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like headphones for the entertainment system?

choices.text: That would be great, thank you.

scenes.npcDialog: Please return to your seat and fasten your seatbelt. We're experiencing turbulence.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 좌석으로 돌아가 안전벨트를 매주세요. 난기류가 있습니다.

choices.text: Okay, I'll sit down right away.
Is it going to be a rough ride?

scenes.npcDialog: We'll be landing in 30 minutes. Please put your tray table up and seat in the upright position.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 30분 후 착륙합니다. 테이블을 접고 좌석을 바로 세워주세요.

choices.text: Okay, thank you for letting me know.

scenes.situation: 베이징 도착 후 환승 안내를 받는다. 중국어 안내 표지판이 복잡하다.
scenes.npcDialog: Connecting flight? Show me your boarding pass. Transit visa not needed for under 24 hours. Terminal 3, Gate E area.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 환승이세요? 탑승권 보여주세요. 24시간 미만이면 환승 비자 필요없어요. 터미널 3, E구역으로 가세요.

choices.text: Thank you! I have 4 hours. Is that enough time?
Where do I go through security again?
choices.feedback: 환승 보안검색 위치를 묻는 것이 좋습니다.

choices.text: Why is this airport so confusing?
choices.feedback: 공항 직원에게 불만을 표하는 것은 적절하지 않습니다.

scenes.situation: 중국 공항 보안검색을 통과한다. 검색이 까다롭다.
scenes.npcDialog: Laptop out. Belt off. Water bottle - throw away. Everything in the tray.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 노트북 꺼내세요. 벨트 벗으세요. 물병 버리세요. 전부 트레이에 넣으세요.

choices.text: Sure, just a moment. Is this correct?
I understand. Should I take off my shoes too?
I already went through security in Seoul!

choices.feedback: 보안요원에게 짜증을 표하면 추가 검색을 받을 수 있습니다.

scenes.situation: 대기 시간에 중국 음식을 먹으려 한다. 메뉴가 중국어로만 되어 있다.
scenes.npcDialog: Nǐ hǎo! What you want? We have Beijing noodles, dumplings, Peking duck rice. Very good!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 니하오! 뭐 드실래요? 북경면, 만두, 북경오리덮밥 있어요. 아주 맛있어요!

choices.text: I'll try the Beijing noodles. How spicy is it?
choices.feedback: 현지 음식에 도전하면서 맵기를 확인하는 것이 좋습니다.

choices.text: Can I see a picture menu? I'd like dumplings.
choices.feedback: 사진 메뉴를 요청하는 것은 외국에서 유용한 방법입니다.
중국에서 중국 음식을 거부하는 것은 아쉬운 선택입니다.

choices.text: I can't read this menu at all.

scenes.situation: 중국 특산품을 구경한다. 직원이 적극적으로 권한다.
scenes.npcDialog: Chinese tea! Very famous! Oolong, Pu'er, Longjing. Good price for you. Special airport discount!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 중국차예요! 아주 유명해요! 우롱차, 보이차, 용정차. 좋은 가격에 드릴게요. 공항 특별 할인!

choices.text: Can I try a sample? What's Pu'er tea like?
choices.feedback: 시음을 요청하고 차에 대해 물어보는 것이 좋습니다.

choices.text: Thanks, just looking for now. I'll come back if I have time.
Too expensive. Everything in China is fake anyway.

choices.feedback: 적극적인 판매는 중국 문화의 일부입니다. 정중히 거절하세요.

scenes.situation: 약간의 위안화가 필요할 것 같아 환전을 고려한다.
scenes.npcDialog: Change money? Korean won to Chinese yuan. Today rate not bad. You need receipt?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 환전하실래요? 한국 원화를 중국 위안화로. 오늘 환율 나쁘지 않아요. 영수증 필요하세요?

choices.text: What's the exchange rate? I just need about 100 yuan.
choices.feedback: 환율을 확인하고 필요한 만큼만 환전하는 것이 현명합니다.

choices.text: I'll pay by card everywhere. Thanks anyway.
choices.feedback: 카드 사용을 선호한다고 말하는 것도 괜찮습니다.
공항 환전소가 비싼 것은 사실이지만 무례하게 말할 필요는 없습니다.

scenes.situation: 드디어 다음 비행기 탑승 게이트에 도착했다. 탑승이 곧 시작된다.
scenes.npcDialog: Flight to Moscow now boarding. Business class and families with children first, then zone 1.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 모스크바행 탑승을 시작합니다. 비즈니스석과 어린이 동반 가족 먼저, 그 다음 존 1.

choices.text: I'm in zone 2. How much longer until my zone?
choices.feedback: 자신의 탑승 순서를 확인하는 것이 좋습니다.

choices.text: Made it! That was a tight connection.
I should board first, I've been waiting forever.

scenes.situation: 모스크바에 도착했다. 두 번째 경유지. 러시아어 안내방송이 흐른다.
scenes.npcDialog: Dobro pozhalovat' v Moskvu! Welcome to Moscow. Connecting flight to Amsterdam? Terminal D, follow green signs.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 모스크바에 오신 것을 환영합니다! 암스테르담 환승이요? 터미널 D, 초록색 표지판을 따라가세요.

choices.text: Spasibo! Is there a fast track for transit passengers?
choices.feedback: 러시아어로 감사하다고 하면 좋은 인상을 줍니다.

choices.text: Thank you! How long is the walk to Terminal D?
I can't understand Russian at all.
choices.feedback: 영어로 안내를 해주고 있으니 감사해야 합니다.

scenes.situation: 터미널 간 이동을 위해 공항 내부 셔틀을 탄다.
scenes.npcDialog: Shuttle to Terminal D departing. Hold on to the rail. Next stop, international departures.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 터미널 D행 셔틀 출발합니다. 손잡이를 잡으세요. 다음 정거장, 국제선 출발.

choices.text: Perfect timing! This airport is huge.
How many minutes to Terminal D?
Why is this airport so spread out?

choices.feedback: 터미널 간 거리가 매우 멀 수 있습니다.

scenes.situation: 추운 날씨 탓에 따뜻한 음료가 마시고 싶다. 러시아 전통 음료를 발견한다.
scenes.npcDialog: Russian tea? We serve in traditional style with jam. Or try sbiten - honey spiced drink, very warming!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 러시아 차요? 전통 방식으로 잼과 함께 드려요. 아니면 스비텐 - 꿀 향신료 음료, 아주 따뜻해요!

choices.text: Sbiten sounds interesting! Is it sweet?
I'll try the Russian tea with jam. That's unique!
choices.feedback: 러시아 차 문화를 경험하는 좋은 선택입니다.

choices.text: Just a regular coffee, nothing Russian.
choices.feedback: 현지 음료를 시도해보는 것이 여행의 재미입니다.
다른 문화를 비하하는 것은 적절하지 않습니다.

scenes.situation: 러시아 기념품 가게를 둘러본다. 마트료시카 인형과 보드카가 진열되어 있다.
scenes.npcDialog: Matryoshka dolls! Each one hand-painted. This set has 7 dolls inside. Also Russian vodka, Beluga, Stolichnaya - very smooth.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 마트료시카 인형이에요! 하나하나 손으로 그렸어요. 이 세트는 7개가 들어있어요. 러시아 보드카도 있어요, 벨루가, 스톨리치나야 - 아주 부드러워요.

choices.text: The dolls are beautiful! How much for the 5-piece set?
Can I buy vodka here and take it on the plane?
choices.feedback: 면세점 구매 규정을 확인하는 좋은 질문입니다.

choices.text: All these Russian things are tourist traps.
I don't drink and dolls are for kids.

scenes.situation: 피곤해서 잠시 쉬려는데 러시아 여행자가 말을 건다.
scenes.npcDialog: Long journey, eh? Where you flying to? I'm going to Paris. First time outside Russia!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 긴 여정이죠? 어디로 가세요? 전 파리 가요. 러시아 밖은 처음이에요!

choices.text: Amsterdam! It's my first time in Europe too. How exciting!
choices.feedback: 다른 여행자와 교류하는 것은 좋은 경험입니다.

choices.text: I'm heading to the Netherlands. Have a great trip to Paris!

scenes.situation: 암스테르담행 비행기 탑승이 시작된다. 드디어 마지막 비행기다.
scenes.npcDialog: Final call for Amsterdam flight. All passengers please proceed to gate immediately. Doors closing in 10 minutes.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 암스테르담행 마지막 호출입니다. 모든 승객은 즉시 게이트로 이동해주세요. 10분 후 문 닫힙니다.

choices.text: I'm here! Last leg of the journey, finally!
Just in time. My boarding pass is ready.
I need more time to shop!

scenes.npcDialog: What is the purpose of your visit?
How long will you be staying?

choices.text: I'll be here for two weeks.

scenes.npcDialog: Where will you be staying?

choices.text: I'm staying at the Hilton Hotel.
At a hotel in the city center.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have a return ticket?

choices.text: Yes, I'm flying back on the 15th.

scenes.npcDialog: Which carousel is your luggage on?

choices.text: I'm not sure. My flight was from Seoul.

scenes.npcDialog: Is there a problem with your luggage?

choices.text: Yes, my bag hasn't come out yet.
I can't find my suitcase. It's a black one.

scenes.npcDialog: How much would you like to exchange?

choices.text: Can I exchange 300 dollars to euros?

scenes.npcDialog: Today's rate is 1.08 euros per dollar. Is that okay?
How can I help you today?

choices.text: How do I get to the city center?
What's the best way to get downtown?

scenes.npcDialog: Where would you like to go?

choices.text: One ticket to Central Station, please.
How much is a ticket to the city center?

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening! Do you have a reservation?

choices.text: Yes, I have a reservation under Kim.
Yes, I booked online. Here's my confirmation.
No, but give me the best room.

scenes.npcDialog: Your room includes breakfast. It's served from 7 to 10 AM.

choices.text: Great, where is the breakfast room?
Perfect, thank you for the information.

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else you need?

choices.text: Could you tell me the WiFi password?

scenes.npcDialog: Buongiorno! The Colosseum could hold 50,000 spectators! Skip-the-line tickets save hours. Would you like an audio guide?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 본조르노! 콜로세움은 5만 명 수용했어요! 줄 안 서는 티켓으로 몇 시간 절약해요. 오디오 가이드 원하세요?

choices.text: Yes, please! I want to learn about the gladiators.
Skip-the-line sounds great. How much is it?

scenes.npcDialog: The Spanish Steps are famous from Roman Holiday! 135 steps connect Piazza di Spagna to Trinità dei Monti church. Great for people watching!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 스페인 계단은 로마의 휴일로 유명해요! 135계단이 스페인 광장과 트리니타 데이 몬티 성당을 연결해요. 사람 구경 최고예요!

choices.text: I loved that movie! Is eating gelato here allowed?
135 steps! I'll work off my pasta.

scenes.npcDialog: Bernini's sculptures here are masterpieces! Apollo and Daphne looks so real. Reservations are required - only 360 visitors every 2 hours.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 여기 베르니니 조각품은 걸작이에요! 아폴로와 다프네가 정말 실감나요. 예약 필수 - 2시간마다 360명만 입장해요.

choices.text: I made a reservation! Where's Apollo and Daphne?
The marble looks like real skin! How is that possible?

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to the business center. How can I assist you?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 비즈니스센터에 오신 것을 환영합니다. 어떻게 도와드릴까요?

choices.text: I need to print some documents.
Is there a computer I can use?

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for a corporate gift?

choices.text: Yes, something elegant for our client.
What do you recommend for business partners?
Gifts are a waste of money.

scenes.npcDialog: Need any help with printing?

choices.text: I need to print a contract. Can you help format it?

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! You booked a 6-bed dorm, right? Here's your locker key.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 환영합니다! 6인실 도미토리 예약하셨죠? 여기 락커 키입니다.

choices.text: Yes, that's correct. Where is my bed?
I want a private room now.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need help with the bus?

choices.text: Which bus goes to the old town?
How much is the bus fare?

scenes.npcDialog: Legend says throw one coin to return to Rome, two for love, three for marriage! Use your right hand over left shoulder. Buona fortuna!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 전설에 따르면 동전 하나는 로마 재방문, 둘은 사랑, 셋은 결혼! 오른손으로 왼쪽 어깨 너머로 던지세요. 행운을 빌어요!

choices.text: I'll definitely throw one! I want to come back.
How much money gets collected from the fountain?

scenes.npcDialog: Via del Corso has the best Italian fashion! Looking for leather goods? Italian leather is world-famous. We also have beautiful silk scarves.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 비아 델 코르소에 이탈리아 패션이 다 있어요! 가죽 제품 찾으세요? 이탈리아 가죽은 세계적으로 유명해요. 실크 스카프도 예뻐요.

choices.text: I'd love to see the leather bags!
What makes Italian leather so special?

scenes.npcDialog: The Mouth of Truth! Legend says it bites liars' hands off! Put your hand in and say something true. Don't worry, it's just a legend!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 진실의 입이에요! 전설에 따르면 거짓말쟁이 손을 물어요! 손 넣고 진실을 말하세요. 걱정 마세요, 전설일 뿐이에요!

choices.text: Okay, I'm brave! *puts hand in* I love Rome!
This is from Roman Holiday too, right?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to book a meeting room?

choices.text: Yes, for 6 people tomorrow at 2 PM.
What equipment is included in the room?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like pressing service for your suit?

choices.text: Yes, please. I need it by 7 AM tomorrow.
How long does express pressing take?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to send something?

choices.text: Yes, I need to courier these documents urgently.
What's the fastest shipping option to Korea?

scenes.npcDialog: The shared kitchen is on the first floor. Do you have any questions?

choices.text: Can I store food in the fridge?
What time does the kitchen close?

scenes.npcDialog: Are you looking for something?

choices.text: Is the museum within walking distance?
How long does it take to walk there?

scenes.npcDialog: Ciao! Roman pizza is thin and crispy, not like Naples! Try our Pizza Margherita or Cacio e Pepe pizza. Made in wood-fired oven!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 챠오! 로마 피자는 나폴리와 달리 얇고 바삭해요! 마르게리타나 까치오 에 페페 피자 드셔보세요. 화덕에서 구워요!

choices.text: Margherita please! I love the classic taste.
What's Cacio e Pepe pizza like?

scenes.npcDialog: Try our four Roman pastas! Carbonara, Amatriciana, Cacio e Pepe, or Gricia. All made with guanciale - that's cured pork cheek. Delizioso!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 로마 4대 파스타 드셔보세요! 카르보나라, 아마트리치아나, 까치오 에 페페, 그리치아. 전부 관찰레 - 돼지 볼살로 만들어요. 맛있어요!

choices.text: I'll try the authentic Carbonara! No cream, right?

scenes.situation: 캄포 데 피오리 시장에서 장을 본다
scenes.npcDialog: Fresh produce every morning! Try our sun-dried tomatoes, olive oil, and pecorino cheese. We also have fresh pasta and Roman artichokes!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 매일 아침 신선한 농산물! 썬드라이 토마토, 올리브 오일, 페코리노 치즈 드셔보세요. 생파스타와 로마 아티초크도 있어요!

choices.text: The olive oil smells amazing! Can I taste it?
I can buy this at a supermarket.

scenes.npcDialog: The printer is right there. Need help?

choices.text: Can you help me make 10 copies?

scenes.npcDialog: That'll be 35 euros.

choices.text: Can I get a receipt, please? For my expense report.
I need a proper receipt with the company name.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need laundry service?

choices.text: I need my shirt cleaned urgently. Is same-day possible?
I have a meeting in 4 hours. Can you clean this quickly?

scenes.npcDialog: Is this your first time at a hostel?

choices.text: Yes, where are the shared bathrooms?
Where can I take a shower?

scenes.npcDialog: We have a free walking tour starting at 10 AM. Interested?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 오전 10시에 무료 워킹투어가 있어요. 관심 있으세요?

choices.text: Yes! How long is the tour?
If it's free, it's probably bad.

scenes.npcDialog: The Sistine Chapel ceiling took Michelangelo 4 years! No photos inside, but you can buy postcards. The Creation of Adam is breathtaking!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 시스티나 성당 천장은 미켈란젤로가 4년 걸렸어요! 내부 촬영 금지지만 엽서 살 수 있어요. 아담의 창조가 숨막혀요!

choices.text: 4 years on his back! That's incredible dedication.
I'll definitely look for The Creation of Adam.

scenes.npcDialog: The Roman Forum was the heart of ancient Rome! Senators walked these streets. The Temple of Saturn still has eight columns standing.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 로마 포로는 고대 로마의 심장이었어요! 원로원 의원들이 이 거리를 걸었어요. 사투르누스 신전에 아직 8개 기둥이 있어요.

choices.text: I can almost imagine the senators walking here!
How old are these ruins exactly?

scenes.npcDialog: Trastevere is the heart of Roman nightlife! Cobblestone streets, outdoor restaurants, live music. The neighborhood comes alive after sunset!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 트라스테베레는 로마 밤문화의 심장이에요! 돌길, 야외 레스토랑, 라이브 음악. 해 지면 동네가 살아나요!

choices.text: This atmosphere is magical! Any restaurant recommendations?
I love the cobblestone streets! Very romantic.
I prefer staying at the hotel.

scenes.npcDialog: Will you need any interpretation services?

choices.text: Yes, do you have a Korean interpreter?

scenes.npcDialog: How would you like to pay?

choices.text: I'll pay with my corporate credit card.
Send the bill to my boss.

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you with your booking?

choices.text: I need to change my flight to tomorrow. Is that possible?
My meeting got extended. Can I fly out a day later?

scenes.npcDialog: Your ticket includes only cabin baggage. Do you have checked luggage?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 티켓에는 기내 수하물만 포함되어 있어요. 위탁 수하물 있으세요?

choices.text: How much extra for checked baggage?
I only have carry-on, so I'm fine.

scenes.npcDialog: Cooking tonight? There's a supermarket around the corner.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 오늘 저녁 요리하세요? 코너 돌면 슈퍼마켓 있어요.

choices.text: Great! Do they have fresh vegetables?
Cooking is a waste of time.

scenes.npcDialog: Gelato artigianale! We make fresh daily. Pistachio, stracciatella, or limone? You can try before choosing. Due gusti or tre gusti?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 수제 젤라토예요! 매일 신선하게 만들어요. 피스타치오, 스트라치아텔라, 리모네? 맛보고 고르세요. 두 가지? 세 가지?

choices.text: Can I try the pistachio? It looks amazing!
I'll have tre gusti - pistachio, chocolate, and lemon.

scenes.npcDialog: St. Peter's Basilica is the largest church in the world! Climbing the dome offers amazing views. Dress code: no shorts or bare shoulders.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 성 베드로 대성당은 세계 최대 성당이에요! 돔에 올라가면 경치가 끝내줘요. 복장: 반바지, 민소매 안 돼요.

choices.text: I'll definitely climb the dome! How many steps?
Good thing I brought a scarf to cover my shoulders.

scenes.npcDialog: Termini Station is the main hub! Validate your ticket before boarding. The machine stamps the date and time. Otherwise you'll get a fine!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 테르미니 역이 중앙 허브예요! 승차 전 티켓 펀칭하세요. 기계가 날짜와 시간을 찍어요. 안 하면 벌금 물어요!

choices.text: Thanks for the tip! Where's the validation machine?
I almost forgot to validate! That was close.
Why do I need to validate?

scenes.npcDialog: Thank you for coming. Shall we get started?

choices.text: Thank you for having us. Yes, let's begin.
It's a pleasure to be here. Please, go ahead.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like a receipt?

choices.text: Yes, and can I get a proper invoice for my company?
I need an invoice with VAT details.

scenes.npcDialog: What can I get for you?

choices.text: One kebab, please. How much is it?
What's the cheapest thing on the menu?
Is this food safe to eat?

scenes.npcDialog: Regular admission is 15 euros.

choices.text: Do you have any free admission days?

scenes.npcDialog: The Pantheon is 2000 years old and the dome is still the world's largest unreinforced concrete dome! When it rains, water comes through the oculus.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 판테온은 2000년 됐고 돔은 아직도 세계 최대 무보강 콘크리트 돔이에요! 비 오면 오쿨루스로 물이 들어와요.

choices.text: 2000 years old! The Romans were incredible engineers.
Where does the rain go when it comes inside?

scenes.npcDialog: A Vespa tour of Rome! Very romantic, very Italian! You need a license though. We also have guided Vespa tours if you prefer.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 로마에서 베스파 투어! 아주 로맨틱하고 이탈리안해요! 면허 필요해요. 가이드 베스파 투어도 있어요.

choices.text: A guided tour sounds perfect! What do we see?
I have an international license. How much for rental?

scenes.npcDialog: Your last night in Rome! Let's make it special. Antipasto, primo, secondo, dolce - the full Italian experience! Limoncello to finish?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 로마에서 마지막 밤이네요! 특별하게 해드릴게요. 전채, 프리모, 세콘도, 돌체 - 정통 이탈리안 코스! 리몬첼로로 마무리?

choices.text: Yes! I want the full Italian experience!
Limoncello sounds perfect! What's for dessert?
Four courses is too much food.

scenes.npcDialog: Here's my business card.

choices.text: Thank you. Here's mine as well.
I appreciate it. Let me give you mine.

scenes.npcDialog: I see you have a reservation for tonight.

choices.text: Yes, is early check-in possible? I have a meeting at 2.
I just landed. Can I get my room now?

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! Would you like a meal or just a sandwich?

choices.text: How much is the value meal?

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for luggage storage?

choices.text: Yes, how much for a small locker?
I'll just leave it on the floor.

scenes.npcDialog: Un caffè? In Italy, caffè means espresso! Stand at the bar like a local - it's cheaper. Cappuccino is only for breakfast, you know.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 커피요? 이탈리아에서 카페는 에스프레소예요! 로컬처럼 바에서 서서 마시면 저렴해요. 카푸치노는 아침에만 마셔요.

choices.text: I'll have an espresso at the bar like a local!
Why is cappuccino only for breakfast?
I want a large iced caramel latte.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to our enoteca! Would you like to try local wines? Frascati is from the hills near Rome. Chianti from Tuscany is also excellent.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 에노테카에 오신 걸 환영해요! 로컬 와인 드셔볼래요? 프라스카티는 로마 근교 언덕에서 나요. 토스카나 키안티도 훌륭해요.

choices.text: I'd love to try Frascati since it's local!
Can you recommend a good red wine?
Wine all tastes the same to me.

scenes.npcDialog: Your client has arrived. Shall I bring the menus?

choices.text: Yes, please. And a bottle of wine for the table.
Thank you. We'll order in a few minutes.
I'm not paying for this meal.

scenes.npcDialog: Check-out is normally at 11 AM.

choices.text: Is late checkout possible? My flight is at 8 PM.
Could I extend until 3 PM? I have meetings until noon.

scenes.npcDialog: Will that be all?

choices.text: Yes, and can you heat this up for me?
Do you have any meal deals?
This is too expensive for a convenience store.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you with anything?

choices.text: I just want WiFi, no food.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to toast to the partnership?
Welcome to the business lounge. How long until your flight?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 비즈니스 라운지에 오신 것을 환영합니다. 비행기까지 얼마나 남았어요?

choices.text: About 2 hours. Is there a quiet area to work?
I have some time. Where can I take a call privately?

scenes.npcDialog: This souvenir is 20 euros.

choices.text: Can you give me a discount? How about 15?
Just give it to me for free.

scenes.npcDialog: Front desk, how may I help you?

choices.text: The air conditioning in my room isn't working.
I can't figure out how to adjust the temperature.

scenes.npcDialog: Housekeeping, can I help you?

choices.text: Could I get some extra towels, please?
I need more towels for my room.

scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! How can I assist you today?

choices.text: Could I get a late checkout?

scenes.npcDialog: Are you checking out today?

choices.text: Yes, I'd like to check out.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like us to store your luggage?

choices.text: Yes, I'll pick it up around 3 PM.
That would be great. My flight is this evening.

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening! Table for how many?
Are you ready to order?

choices.text: Yes, I'll have the pasta, please.
Could I have a few more minutes?

scenes.npcDialog: What would you like to drink?

choices.text: I'll have a glass of water, please.
Could I see the wine list?

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have any food allergies?
Can I get you anything else?
How would you like to pay?

choices.text: Can I pay with credit card?

scenes.npcDialog: Where to?

choices.text: Can you take me to this address?

scenes.npcDialog: That'll be 25 euros.

choices.text: Here you go. Keep the change.

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you?

choices.text: One ticket to Central Station, please.
How much is a day pass?
I want to ride for free.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you with directions?

choices.text: Does this bus go to the museum?
Which bus goes to the city center?

scenes.npcDialog: Excuse me, are you lost?

choices.text: Yes, I'm looking for the train station.
Could you tell me how to get to the museum?

scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! Where are you flying to today?

choices.text: I don't want to go home.

scenes.npcDialog: Last minute shopping? Can I help you find something?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 마지막 쇼핑하세요? 뭔가 찾는 거 도와드릴까요?

choices.text: I'm looking for some chocolate as a gift.
Do you have any local souvenirs?

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need a customs declaration form?

choices.text: Yes, please. What do I need to declare?
Do I need to declare gifts I bought?
